creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Secret Priority Pass Hack at Newark Airport

Minute Suites in Terminal C near gate 125

#nyc #NJ #Newark #travel #airport

transcription.text: Just got to the Newark Airport and Priority Pass does not get you into any lounges, however, a little known secret is it does get you into here. All right, here we go. Wow, look at this. I know I already put this in here, but dude, this is really nice. Got a desk, TV, little couch to sit down and enjoy. They even have a speaker over here and let's see what the lights do over here. Boom. All right, I'm not mad at it. It's not quite a lounge, but we got our coffee and it's time to relax. So see you in about an hour.
